# Version 3.116.0
> **First stable v3 release** · Released December 2, 2024 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.116.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.116.0)

> **Supersedes [3.0.0](3.0.0.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.116.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.116.0 is the first stable v3 release, built on Skia m116 with .NET 9 support and legacy APIs removed. This release modernises the whole stack: LibraryImport-based interop, refreshed native dependencies, WebAssembly SIMD/threaded builds, new accelerated views on WinUI and WPF, Metal on Mac Catalyst, and dozens of MAUI/Uno/Blazor fixes.

## Breaking Changes

- **All v2 [Obsolete] members removed** — Everything marked [Obsolete] during the v2 line — including the legacy SKPaint text/font members — is gone. Move text state to SKFont, use the modern sampling and encoder overloads, and re-generate against the 3.116 APIs. ([#2539](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2539), [#2789](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2789), [#2775](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2775))
- **Modern .NET target framework baseline** — The libraries now target .NET 8/9 and the corresponding MAUI/Uno/WinUI workloads. Projects on older TFMs may need SDK, workload or PackageReference updates to consume the new packages. ([#2927](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2927), [#2971](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2971), [#2788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2788), [#2917](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2917))
- **Metal is the default backend on Mac Catalyst** — SkiaSharp.Views on Mac Catalyst now renders through Metal instead of the deprecated GL path. Hosts that assumed GL should switch to the Metal APIs or the shared SKCanvasView. ([#2747](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2747), [#3070](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3070))

## Engine

- **Skia rebased on milestone 116** — The bundled engine is Chrome/Skia m116, bringing years of upstream rendering, text and codec fixes into a stable release. — ❤️ [@Redth](https://github.com/Redth) ([#2829](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2829), [#2885](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2885), [#3026](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3026))
- **Native dependencies refreshed** — HarfBuzz moves to 8.3.0, libjpeg-turbo to 3.0.0 (rolled back to 2.1.5.1 for stability) and libwebp to 1.3.2, alongside the usual codec and font engine bumps. ([#2624](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2624), [#2582](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2582), [#2583](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2583), [#2699](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2699), [#2622](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2622))

## API Surface

- **SKBlender, extended color filters and picture APIs** — Exposes SKBlender, adds the missing color-filter constructors, more SKPicture entry points and an R-Tree overload of BeginRecording for faster hit-testing. ([#2830](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2830), [#2879](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2879), [#2883](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2883), [#2889](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2889))
- **Span overloads for hot paths** — SetRectRadii, SKMatrix.MapPoints/MapVectors, SKPath.AddPoly, the color filters and GetPixelSpan with offsets all take Span<T>, letting callers avoid array allocations in tight rendering loops. — ❤️ [@Youssef1313](https://github.com/Youssef1313), [@alexandrvslv](https://github.com/alexandrvslv) ([#2949](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2949), [#3030](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3030), [#2879](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2879), [#2609](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2609))
- **Skottie animation builder and raw shaders** — Binds Skottie's Animation Builder and adds SKImage.ToRawShader for advanced compositing scenarios. ([#2630](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2630), [#2748](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2748))
- **Metal backend surfaced cross-platform** — Adds the Metal GRBackendRenderTarget APIs on every Apple platform and unifies GRMtlTextureInfo with readonly getters. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#3070](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3070), [#2833](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2833), [#2788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2788))

## Bug Fixes

- **Cloned SKPaint no longer crashes on dispose** — Fixes an AccessViolationException when disposing a paint cloned from another paint. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid) ([#2904](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2904))
- **Metal snapshot returns real pixels** — Snapshot on the Metal backend no longer returns a magenta image on Apple platforms. — ❤️ [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#2804](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2804))
- **PNG encoder options behaviour restored** — SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions now matches the 2.88.8 behaviour that had regressed during the m11x work. — ❤️ [@sungaila](https://github.com/sungaila) ([#3014](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3014))
- **MAUI, WinUI and Uno view fixes** — Fixes memory leaks in MAUI views, WinUI XamlRoot handling, Uno canvas context activation, background stretching in SKXamlCanvas, and the .NET 9 Blazor import path. — ❤️ [@jeromelaban](https://github.com/jeromelaban), [@Youssef1313](https://github.com/Youssef1313) ([#2955](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2955), [#2854](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2854), [#2559](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2559), [#2922](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2922), [#2918](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2918), [#3081](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3081), [#3087](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3087))

## Platform

- **New accelerated views for WinUI, WPF and MAUI** — Adds SKSwapChainPanel-backed WinUI views, a real SKGLElement for WPF, and the SKGLView for MAUI on Windows. — ❤️ [@gmurray81](https://github.com/gmurray81) ([#2733](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2733), [#2317](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2317), [#2598](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2598))
- **WebAssembly threaded and SIMD builds** — Ships SkiaSharp WebAssembly variants that opt into multi-threading and/or SIMD when the host allows them. ([#2620](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2620))
- **Metal-first Apple stack** — Mac Catalyst renders with Metal by default, and iOS/tvOS/macOS all share the Metal backend APIs. ([#2747](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2747), [#3070](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3070))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **LibraryImport-based interop** — The P/Invoke layer moves to LibraryImport and function pointers for AOT-friendly, trim-safe interop, and PlatformConfiguration is trimmable. — ❤️ [@maxkatz6](https://github.com/maxkatz6) ([#2917](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2917), [#2717](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2717), [#2920](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2920))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0

HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0 ships alongside the stable v3 line, tracking HarfBuzz 8.3.0 upstream and picking up the LibraryImport interop modernisation and packaging fixes.

## Preview 6 (November 5, 2024)

Preview 6 finalised the .NET 9 Blazor import fix, the WASM Blazor workaround and the Windows SDK version pin.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.5.4...v3.116.0-preview.6.1)

## Preview 5 (October 24, 2024)

Preview 5 rebased on Skia m116, cut the remaining v2 shims and moved to LibraryImport.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.4.1...v3.0.0-preview.5.4)

## Preview 4 (July 18, 2024)

Preview 4 landed the accelerated WinUI and WPF views, more Skottie bindings and a raft of MAUI/Uno fixes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.3.1...v3.0.0-preview.4.1)

## Preview 3 (April 9, 2024)

Preview 3 focused on APIs — SKBlender, more SKPicture entry points and the R-Tree overload.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.2.1...v3.0.0-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (February 20, 2024)

Preview 2 landed the codec dependency refresh (libjpeg-turbo, libwebp, HarfBuzz).

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.0.0-preview.1.8...v3.0.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (February 6, 2024)

Preview 1 modernised the repository, brought the .NET 8 target family online and started deleting the v2 [Obsolete] surface.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v2.88.9...v3.0.0-preview.1.8)
